message:
fix(store): use touch_write instead of touch for HyperLogLog merge

The PFMERGE path was calling entry.touch(now_ms) which only updates
the read timestamp. Since PFMERGE mutates the key's value, it must
call entry.touch_write(now_ms) to correctly update the modification
counter for WATCH correctness, matching the pattern established in
the geo and stream mutation fixes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
